hotels.name: Smile Boutique Hotel by EHM
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Smile Boutique Hotel by EHM se trouve à Phnom Penh, à 1,5 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Temple Wat Phnom. Il propose une piscine extérieure, un jardin, une terrasse et un parking privé gratuit. Cet hôtel 4 étoiles propose un service d'étage et une réception ouverte 24h/24. Lors de votre séjour, vous pourrez prendre un cocktail au bar ou déguster des plats américains et des plats cambodgiens au restaurant.
Les hébergements comprennent la climatisation, un bureau, une bouilloire, un coffre-fort, une télévision à écran plat et une salle de bains privative dotée d’un bidet. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont fournis.
Un petit-déjeuner continental, américain et asiatique est servi sur place.
hotels.description_en:
Prime Location: Smile Boutique Hotel by EHM in Phnom Penh offers a central setting with Wat Phnom an 18-minute walk away and Vattanac Capital 1.6 km nearby. Riverside Park lies 2.1 km from the hotel, while the Royal Palace is 3 km distant.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a swimming pool with a view, sun terrace, and lush garden. The hotel features a restaurant serving American, Thai, Vietnamese, local, Asian, international, and Cambodian cuisines, alongside a bar. Additional amenities include a coffee shop, outdoor seating area, and indoor play area.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms offer air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and city views. Amenities include balconies, sofas, and free toiletries.
hotels.description_es:
Smile Boutique Hotel by EHM se encuentra en Phnom Penh, a 18 min a pie de Wat Phnom, y ofrece alojamiento con piscina al aire libre, parking privado gratis, jardín y terraza. Este hotel de 4 estrellas ofrece servicio de habitaciones y recepción 24 horas. El restaurante sirve platos de cocina americana y de cocina camboyana, y el bar es ideal para tomar algo.
El hotel ofrece habitaciones con aire acondicionado, escritorio, hervidor, caja fuerte, TV de pantalla plana y baño privado con bidet. En Smile Boutique Hotel by EHM, todas las habitaciones cuentan con ropa de cama y toallas.
El desayuno ofrece opciones continentales, americanas o asiáticas.
Se puede jugar al billar en el alojamiento, y la zona es ideal para practicar ciclismo.
hotels.description_pt:
Smile Boutique Hotel by EHM localiza-se em Phnom Penh, a 18 minutos a pé de Wat Phnom, e fornece acomodações com uma piscina exterior, estacionamento privado gratuito, um jardim e um terraço. Este hotel de 4 estrelas dispõe de serviço de quartos e uma receção aberta 24 horas. Os hóspedes podem desfrutar de cozinha americano e cambojana no restaurante ou tomar um cocktail no bar.
Este alojamento com ar condicionado providencia quartos com secretária, chaleira, cofre, televisão de ecrã plano e uma casa de banho privativa com bidé. Os quartos providenciam roupa de cama e toalhas.
São oferecidas opções de pequeno-almoço continental, americano ou asiático.
Pode jogar bilhar em Smile Boutique Hotel by EHM, e a área é popular para ciclismo.
hotels.description_it:
Situato a Phnom Penh, a 1,5 km da Tempio di Wat Phnom, Smile Boutique Hotel by EHM prevede una piscina all'aperto, un parcheggio privato gratuito, un giardino e una terrazza. Questo hotel a 4 stelle offre il servizo in camera e una reception 24 ore su 24. Gli ospiti possono gustare piatti americani e piatti cambogiani al ristorante o sorseggiare un cocktail al bar.
Questo hotel offre agli ospiti camere climatizzate con una scrivania, un bollitore elettrico, una cassaforte, una TV a schermo piatto e un bagno privato con bidet. Presso Smile Boutique Hotel by EHM, tutte le camere dispongono di lenzuola e asciugamani.
A colazione troverete opzioni continentali, americane o asiatiche.
Presso questa struttura, potrete giocare a biliardo, mentre la zona è famosa per il ciclismo.

hotels.name: Chaiya Palace Hotel
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Phnom Penh, l’établissement Chaiya Palace Hotel comprend une piscine extérieure, une salle de sport, un jardin et une terrasse. Cet hôtel 4 étoiles propose un centre d'affaires et un service de concierge. L’établissement propose une réception ouverte 24h/24, des transferts aéroport, un service d'étage et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans l’ensemble de ses locaux.
Les hébergements sont dotés de la climatisation, d’un bureau, d’une bouilloire, d’un minibar, d’un coffre-fort, d’une télévision à écran plat, d’un balcon et d’une salle de bains privative avec une douche. Certains hébergements offrent une vue sur la ville. Tous sont dotés d’un patio. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont fournis.
Un petit-déjeuner buffet, continental et américain est servi sur place.
hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Chaiya Palace Hotel in Phnom Penh offers a 4-star experience with a rooftop swimming pool, spa facilities, fitness centre, sun terrace, and lush garden. Guests enjoy free WiFi, a restaurant, bar, and private check-in and check-out services.
Comfortable Amenities: Rooms feature air-conditioning, balconies with city or river views, private bathrooms, and modern amenities such as minibars and flat-screen TVs. Additional facilities include a hot tub, spa bath, and work desks.
Dining Options: The family-friendly restaurant serves French, American, Thai, Asian, and Cambodian cuisines with vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free options. Breakfast includes local specialities, warm dishes, fresh pastries, and more.
hotels.description_es:
Chaiya Palace Hotel dispone de piscina al aire libre, centro de fitness, jardín y terraza en Phnom Penh. Este hotel de 4 estrellas ofrece servicio de habitaciones, recepción 24 horas y wifi gratis. El restaurante sirve platos de cocina americana y de cocina camboyana, y el bar es ideal para tomar algo.
El hotel ofrece habitaciones con aire acondicionado, escritorio, hervidor, minibar, caja fuerte, TV de pantalla plana, balcón y baño privado con ducha. Chaiya Palace Hotel ofrece algunas unidades con vistas a la ciudad, y todas cuentan con patio. En el alojamiento, todas las habitaciones cuentan con ropa de cama y toallas.
En el alojamiento se puede disfrutar de un desayuno buffet, continental o americano.
hotels.description_pt:
Chaiya Palace Hotel apresenta uma piscina exterior, centro de fitness, um jardim e terraço em Phnom Penh. Este hotel de 4 estrelas dispõe de um centro de negócios e um serviço de concierge. O alojamento fornece receção aberta 24 horas, transfers do aeroporto, serviço de quartos e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade.
O alojamento providencia quartos com com ar condicionado, secretária, chaleira, um minibar, cofre, televisão de ecrã plano, varanda e uma casa de banho privativa com chuveiro. O alojamento dispõe de algumas unidades com vistas da cidade, e todos os quartos estão equipados com pátio. No alojamento, todos os quartos incluem roupa de cama e toalhas.
Os hóspedes podem apreciar pequeno-almoço buffet, continental ou americano no alojamento.
hotels.description_it:
Chaiya Palace Hotel presenta una piscina all'aperto, un centro fitness, un giardino e una terrazza a Phnom Penh. Questo hotel a 4 stelle offre un centro business e un servizio concierge. L'alloggio prevede una reception 24 ore su 24, transfer aeroportuali, il servizo in camera e il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura.
Questo hotel offre agli ospiti camere climatizzate dotate di scrivania, bollitore elettrico, minibar, cassaforte, TV a schermo piatto, balcone e bagno privato con doccia. Chaiya Palace Hotel mette a disposizione certe unità con vista sulla città e tutte le camere sono dotate di un patio. Presso questa struttura, tutte le camere includono lenzuola e asciugamani.
Presso la struttura potrete gustare una colazione a buffet, continentale o americana.

hotels.name: Plantation Urban Resort & Spa
hotels.description_fr:
Le Plantation Urban Resort & Spa vous accueille au cœur de Phnom Penh, juste derrière le palais royal. L’établissement possède 2 piscines extérieures, un restaurant et un bar. Une connexion Wi-Fi est disponible gratuitement dans l’ensemble de l’établissement.
Vous séjournerez à 7 km du centre de conférence Chaktomuk et à 6 km du centre commercial Aeon Mall. L’établissement est situé à 10 minutes à pied des berges animées du fleuve et du quartier des divertissements de Phnom Penh. L'aéroport international de Phnom Penh est installé à 10,3 km. Un service de navette aéroport est proposé, moyennant des frais supplémentaires.
Les chambres climatisées et non-fumeurs disposent également d'un ventilateur.
hotels.description_en:
Centrally located in Phnom Penh, Plantation Urban Resort & Spa is situated directly behind the Royal Palace. It features two outdoor swimming pools and guests can enjoy meals at the in-house restaurant or have a drink at the bar. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
It is 1.2 km to Chaktomuk Conference Hall, while Aeon Mall is 3.6 km away. Plantation Urban Resort & Spa is a 10-minute walk from the lively riverfront and Phnom Penh’s entertainment area. Phnom Penh International Airport is 10.3 km from the property. The property offers airport transfer services at an additional charge.
The air-conditioned non-smoking rooms also have a fan option. The seating area is fitted with flat-screen TV, minibar and a desk.
hotels.description_es:
Centrally located in Phnom Penh, Plantation Urban Resort & Spa is situated directly behind the Royal Palace. It features two outdoor swimming pools and guests can enjoy meals at the in-house restaurant or have a drink at the bar. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
It is 1.2 km to Chaktomuk Conference Hall, while Aeon Mall is 3.6 km away. Plantation Urban Resort & Spa is a 10-minute walk from the lively riverfront and Phnom Penh’s entertainment area. Phnom Penh International Airport is 10.3 km from the property. The property offers airport transfer services at an additional charge.
The air-conditioned non-smoking rooms also have a fan option. The seating area is fitted with flat-screen TV, minibar and a desk.
hotels.description_pt:
Centrally located in Phnom Penh, Plantation Urban Resort & Spa is situated directly behind the Royal Palace. It features two outdoor swimming pools and guests can enjoy meals at the in-house restaurant or have a drink at the bar. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
It is 1.2 km to Chaktomuk Conference Hall, while Aeon Mall is 3.6 km away. Plantation Urban Resort & Spa is a 10-minute walk from the lively riverfront and Phnom Penh’s entertainment area. Phnom Penh International Airport is 10.3 km from the property. The property offers airport transfer services at an additional charge.
The air-conditioned non-smoking rooms also have a fan option. The seating area is fitted with flat-screen TV, minibar and a desk.
hotels.description_it:
Il Plantation Urban Resort & Spa si trova nel centro di Phnom Penh, proprio dietro al Palazzo Reale. Come ospiti potrete usufruire di 2 piscine all’aperto, gustare i pasti al ristorante in loco o sorseggiare un drink al bar. Il WiFi è gratuito in tutte le aree.
La struttura dista 1,2 km dalla Sala Conferenze Chaktomuk e 3,6 km dal Centro Commerciale Aeon Mall. Il Plantation Urban Resort & Spa si trova a 10 minuti a piedi dal vivace lungofiume e dalla zona dell’intrattenimento di Phnom Penh. L’Aeroporto Internazionale di Phnom Penh sorge a 10,3 km. La struttura fornisce un servizio di trasferimento aeroportuale a un costo aggiuntivo.
Le camere non fumatori sono dotate di aria condizionata e di ventilatore. L’area salotto è completa di TV a schermo piatto, minibar e scrivania.
